reviews.review_description:
Extremely uncomfortable to play. The guitar adjustment only allows up and down movement and there is no way to bring the guitar closer to your body. Unfortunately every time you try to move your body closer to the guitar it moves away. 
This makes for a very unnatural stance and position when trying to play.
We need a whay to import songs to play ngl

I've been trying to go through the tutorial 7 times but nothing happens after I pick up the guitar. And I have to wait for the very slow speaking guitar god to ask me to pick that up every time. Do I need to reinstall or?

developer_response.body: Please uninstall the app and install the latest version. Make sure you are online when you start the app for the first time, as additional content will be downloaded.

reviews.review_description: this app rocks! very cool play dynamic, hope to see more songs in the future.

Gameplay method works really well. Looking forward to see how this develops with more songs and maybe a campaign. 

Would good if the notes also represented up and down strums.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your comment. There will be more songs and we are working on some more features..., so, stay tuned!
